title: Realtime Chat App with Rich Media Support

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Realtime Chat App with Rich Media Support

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`
* `#F7F7F7`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
  <g transform='translate(100,100)'>
    <rect x='-50' y='-50' width='300' height='300' rx='20' fill='#F7F7F7' stroke='#C06C88' stroke-width='2'/>
    <rect x='50' y='50' width='200' height='150' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD' stroke='#C06C88' stroke-width='2'/>
    <g fill='#C06C88'>
      <circle cx='100' cy='100' r='20'/>
      <text x='120' y='140' font-size='14' dominant-baseline='middle'>John Doe</text>
    </g>
    <g fill='#B7D7CD'>
      <circle cx='220' cy='100' r='20'/>
      <text x='240' y='140' font-size='14' dominant-baseline='middle'>Jane Doe</text>
    </g>
    <g transform='translate(50,220)'>
      <rect x='-20' y='0' width='40' height='20' fill='#411C56' rx='5'/>
      <text x='20' y='25' font-size='12' dominant-baseline='middle'>Typing...</text>
    </g>
    <g transform='translate(50,240)'>
      <rect x='0' y='-10' width='20' height='20' fill='#411C56' rx='5'/>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use the specified color palette and SVG layout
Must implement rich media support for text messages, images, and emojis
Must display a typing indicator when a user is typing a message

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Realtime Chat App with Rich Media Support

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how well the chat app supports rich media, including text messages, images, and emojis.
Verify that the typing indicator displays correctly when a user is typing a message.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
